credentials.name: Ahrefs API key
credentials.purpose: Off-Page section — Domain Rating, backlinks, referring domains, organic traffic, top anchors (Ahrefs API v3).
credentials.location: AHREFS_API_KEY env var (per-user; Growisto has a subscription)
credentials.fallback_behavior: Off-Page section returns {available:false, reason:'no_key'} per domain; other 4 sections still run.

credentials.name: Google PageSpeed Insights API key
credentials.purpose: Technical section — Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/TBT) + performance scores, mobile + desktop.
credentials.fallback_behavior: Optional — falls back to the Suite's hardcoded PSI key / unauthenticated quota; slower but works.

zero_auth_reason: RUNTIME: AHREFS_API_KEY (per-user env var) is required for the Off-Page section — cannot be baked. PAGESPEED_API_KEY is optional (hardcoded fallback). The other 4 sections run without any key.
